role: Secretary-General, Front of Islamic Revolution Stability; former Interior Minister (2008–2009)
bio: Sadegh Mahsouli is a former [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) commander and the organisational kingmaker within the [Front of Islamic Revolution Stability](/orgs/front-of-islamic-revolution-stability), described by Iranian media as the 'Godfather of Paydari'. He became Secretary-General in 2020, replacing [Morteza Agha-Tehrani](/people/morteza-agha-tehrani). A political associate of [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) from their time as officials in Azerbaijan Province, he served as Interior Minister (2008–2009) and Welfare Minister (2009–2010) under Ahmadinejad. He commands significant IRGC-adjacent organisational networks across provincial Iran.
editorial_notes: Born 1959 in Urmia. IRGC commander in West and East Azerbaijan. Interior Minister 2008–09, Welfare Minister 2009–10. Replaced Agha-Tehrani as Paydari Secretary-General December 2020.
